description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial-style toolbox with a robust red metal body and a flat black top surface. The front face features multiple horizontal drawers of varying heights, each with metallic handles, designed for organized storage of tools and equipment. The toolbox is mounted on four caster wheels, allowing for easy mobility across workshop or garage floors. The sides are plain, with a single horizontal handle on each end for manual maneuvering. The rear is solid and unadorned, providing structural support. The overall construction suggests durability and heavy-duty use, suitable for professional or urban maintenance environments.
description: A large red metal toolbox with multiple front drawers, a flat black top, and caster wheels for mobility. It features side handles and a robust, industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain red panel with a single horizontal handle near the top and two visible caster wheels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying multiple metallic-handled drawers of varying sizes, a black top surface, and all four caster wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain red panel and a horizontal handle at the top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid red panel with no visible handles or drawers, and two caster wheels at the base.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed horizontal bar handles made of metal, located on each side for pushing or pulling; ergonomic grip with a cylindrical shape.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Implied sliding mechanism for drawers, no visible external latches or locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Front face has at least ten horizontal drawers of varying heights, arranged in two columns; all drawers appear fixed and non-removable.
